what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-assets channel, linking the attachment id to the image asset at image://design-assets/icons/Maps_Gold.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Target uses an image:// URI pointing to design-assets/icons/Maps_Gold
Added timestamp is an ISO 8601 UTC value: 2026-06-22T12:26:23.784948+00:00
conventions: Asset reference via image:// URI scheme
concerns: The image:// URI cannot be resolved from this file alone
No author, modifier, or versioning fields
No dimensions, alt text, or MIME type
Only an added timestamp; no updated/deleted lifecycle
notes: A bare ledger entry that maps an attachment id to a specific image asset in the design-assets channel.
questions: What does the Maps_Gold icon represent?
How is the image:// URI resolved to an actual file?
Is this attachment still current or has it been superseded?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches what it does: it is an attachment metadata record that identifies an image target.
intention_signals: To create a persistent, channel-scoped record that associates an attachment identifier with a specific image asset and records when it was added.
novelty: Use of an image:// URI scheme to target a channel asset.
contribution: Provides a concrete attachment-to-asset mapping with a creation timestamp for the design-assets channel.
summary_for_embedding: Markdown file with YAML frontmatter recording an image attachment (att-2163a9e2) in the design-assets channel targeting image://design-assets/icons/Maps_Gold, added 2026-06-22T12:26:23Z.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog when and where an image asset was attached in the design-assets channel.
